meta.title: Machine Learning With and Without the Hype
meta.description:
This was listed as one of the favorite S4x17 sessions by many attendees. Kathryn Hume of Fast Forward Labs provides an introduction into what machine learning is and three of the basic techniques used in machine learning. It is not ICS specific, but she does give some ideas as to how this could be applied to ICS. 

It's entertaining and informative.
